hash: 221c71e2
date: 2026-07-05
subject: fix(soil): legacy raw-id rows are unaddressable — get/delete/update fallback
body:
The 06-12 layout-unification migration left every pre-migration row whose id contains ':' unreachable by get/delete/update while still appearing in list output. _id_candidates() now falls back to the raw id.
